title: ‘Soulless’: Founder of $32m app lashes out at AI
US panel advances chip security act to curb smuggling of AI semiconductors to China
description: Washington DC [US] March 30 (ANI): The House Foreign Affairs Committee has passed bipartisan legislation aimed at curbing the smuggling of advanced American semiconductors to foreign adversaries, according to a release by the Select Committee on the Chinese Communist Party (SCCCP). According to the SCCCP release, the proposed Chip Security Act, introduced last year, comes in response to bipartisan concerns raised
